actions.text: REPLY TONIGHT. Julian has been waiting 8+ hours. He's available Mon/Tue/Wed/Fri evening this week (04/06-04/10). Suggest Tuesday 04/07 or Wednesday 04/08 evening to give Mike prep time. failed: **🚨 CRITICAL: Julian Flanagan has been waiting 8+ hours for a reply to confirm tour time.** He replied at 10:47 AM EDT saying he's available any evening except Thursday. The morning sweep flagged this and sent Mike an iMessage, but no reply has been sent on SpareRoom. This is the #1 risk to our only active prospect. Mike MUST reply tonight.
SpareRoom thread view still renders blank white page (persistent bug since 04/03). Workaround: read_page accessibility tree works to extract content.
FB Marketplace renewal still not done (97 days old, 196 clicks). This is an ongoing manual action item.
Zillow inbox still unchecked (bot detection, 10+ days since last check). Mike must check manually.
3 FB group reposts still pending (Bay Area/SF Housing, Oakland Housing, SF Bay Area Housing).
log.improvement:
- If Julian's tour is confirmed tonight, prepare a "virtual tour prep" checklist for Mike: clean both rooms, check lighting in each room, test video call setup (FaceTime/Zoom), have a walkthrough script (start with exterior → kitchen → living room → each bedroom → bathrooms → mention BART proximity, street parking, neighborhood). This prep makes the difference between a lukewarm and a locked-in prospect.
- Consider setting up a draft reply template in SpareRoom so the automated sweep can propose replies faster — reduce the gap between prospect message and our response.
